_README: conductor-oss known failures for the agent python e2e suite (bundle: conductor-ai-e2e-python-*, from conductor-oss/python-sdk), consumed by known_failures_plugin.py via E2E_KNOWN_FAILURES. Each key is a pytest node-id (or a '<file>::<Class>::<test>' suffix); the value is the reason + tracking link. The gate stays green by xfail-ing these; a key that matches nothing is a harmless no-op (the test still runs and the gate still catches a real break), and a fixed bug turns its test XPASS — remove the entry then. Do NOT list flaky tests (those are handled by rerun).
_HOWTO: Reconcile from the run's results/junit-e2e.xml. Example entry: "test_suite4_mcp_tools.py::TestSuite4McpTools::test_mcp_lifecycle": "reason — conductor-oss/conductor#NNNN"
test_suite16_cli_skills.py::TestSuite16C: CLI `skill register` → POST /api/skills/register returns 404 ("No static resource api/skills/register") on the server built from main — the skills-register endpoint is not present at this version (it exists in the released 3.32.0-rc.8 that python-sdk's own CI pins). Gate surfaced a real skills-API gap; investigate whether the endpoint needs to land on main.
Same skills-register 404 gap (POST /api/skills/register missing on main); see test_cli_skill_register_list_get_pull_and_delete.
Same skills-register 404 gap (POST /api/skills/register missing on main); see test_cli_skill_register_list_get_pull_and_delete.
